title: polyscias ashtonii
intro: Polyscias ashtonii, also known as the Ashton's Ming or Ming Aralia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae native to the tropical rainforests of Borneo. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Polyscias ashtonii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
